parameters.subsql:
SELECT *
FROM mart.parent_child_leads
WHERE status_id = 143
      AND reason NOT ILIKE 'Передано%'
      AND reason NOT ILIKE 'Партн%'
      AND reason NOT ILIKE 'Рефер%'
      AND reason NOT IN ('Отдел Заботы', 'ХКВ (Архив)', 'Не готовы оплачивать КВ по вторичке',
                         'Трансфер средств', 'Fake lead', 'Family Office', 'Not relevant at the moment',
                         'Postponed to a specific date')
      AND (broker_pipeline = 1 
           OR valid_pipeline = 1)
